title: Gemma 4 vs. Agent Limits: On-Device Power Meets Real-World Gaps — Apr 13
summary: Google's Gemma 4 brings powerful, private agentic AI to phones with full on-device processing, while new research reveals that agent skills often fail under real conditions. Meanwhile, startups and labs are pushing open models, edge deployment, and smarter tool use—highlighting both the promise and pitfalls of today’s AI agents.
